headline: Micron Stock is Now Close to Fair Value, But Shorting 2-Week Puts Yield 7.0%
summary: Micron stock is now close to fair value, as analysts have been raising their revenue forecasts and price targets. One of the best plays now is to sell short out-of-the-money puts expiring 2 weeks out for a 7% yield.

headline: Wolfe Research Raises PT on Micron Technology (MU) Stock
summary: Micron Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MU) is one of the Best Bargain Stocks to Buy in June. On June 11, Wolfe Research lifted its price objective on the company’s stock to $1,250 from $550 and maintained an “Outperform” rating. The firm lifted its memory model to demonstrate increases in DRAM pricing for CY 2026 and CY 2027, respectively. […]
